summary: The test suite is exceptionally thorough and professional. It provides high-granularity unit tests covering all edge cases (parsing errors, case normalization, deny-overrides-allow logic) and a sophisticated integration harness (`run_act_tests.py`) that perfectly fulfills the complex GitHub Actions/act testing requirements. The use of data-driven fixtures for the act-based integration tests and the structural validation of the YAML workflow demonstrate a high level of rigor and design quality.
